mergeRationale: The patch copies dictionaries only in the plain-yield mode; size=True still exposes the reused mutable dictionary inside each tuple.

requiredFindings.summary: The patch copies dictionaries only for size=False yields.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Users of size=True still receive tuples containing the same mutable dictionary object, so saved results are corrupted by later iterations.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Return ms.copy() in every yield branch that exposes the partition dictionary, including size=True.

requiredFindings.summary: The added test checks only sizes, not dictionary object identity or contents over time.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: The regression can survive while sizes remain correct.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Assert unique dict ids and stable copied dict contents for both size modes.

disallowedConclusions: The patch can be merged because the size=True test passes.
Only size=False needs copies because size=True already includes the size separately.
